3058410.name: Альтушка для скуфа: Ещё, ещё!
3058410.description:
The long-awaited addition to the acclaimed game about alt-girls and skoofs!

Features of the DLC
- Three new Altushkas, each with a unique story, not repeating the dialogues in Ksyusha and Nastya’s branches
- Alt girls is voiced by Alina Rin, Persona 99 and Albina Sexoff
- Walktrough time is no less than that of the main part of the game
- 9 (nine) new endings (we think so)
- Mini-games that are not what they seem
- Flexible fortune telling system
- Chilling horror (possibly)
- After passing, your life will not be the same (we do not guarantee)

Attention! This is a DLC, you will need the main 'An alt girl for Skoof' to launch it.
3058410.supported_languages:
俄语*, 英语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
